title: BIRD Project Configuration
description: Configuration for BIRD routing daemon projects. Used by @birdcc/cli and LSP tooling.

$schema.description: Schema URL for IDE support. Can be the official URL, a self-hosted mirror, or a local file path.

main.description: Entry point file path (relative to config file or absolute). Ignored when 'workspaces' is set - each workspace directory is expected to contain its own entry file (defaulting to 'bird.conf').

workspaces.description: Sub-project glob patterns for monorepo. Each matching directory is expected to contain its own entry file.

includePaths.description: Additional include search directories (-I equivalent). Resolved relative to config file location. Defaults to the config file's directory if not specified.

bird.description: BIRD daemon configuration. For validation command, priority is: validateCommand > binaryPath > BIRD_BIN env var > system PATH

version.description: Target BIRD version constraint for compatibility checks

binaryPath.description: Path to bird binary. Used as fallback when validateCommand is not set

validateCommand.description: Full command for syntax validation. The toolchain writes the bundled config to a temp file and substitutes '{file}' with its path before executing. Takes precedence over binaryPath.

socketPath.description: BIRD control socket path for birdc integration

enabled.description: Enable cross-file analysis for include directives

maxFiles.description: Maximum number of files to analyze

withBird.description: Also run bird validation in addition to static analysis. Uses bird.validateCommand if set, otherwise falls back to bird.binaryPath or BIRD_BIN.

rules.description: Per-rule severity overrides. Supports wildcard patterns like 'sym/*'

indentSize.description: Number of spaces per indentation level

safeMode.description: Prevent formatting if syntax errors are detected
